creator: ibex@physik.TU-Berlin.DE
text:
I put an upgraded port of mysql in
	ftp://ftp.freebsd.org/pub/FreeBSD/incoming/mysql-3.21.29g.tar.gz

	Changes in detail:

	- Upgraded to version 3.21.29-gamma
	- eleminated the use of PERL5
	- new patch-ad to make --without-bench actually work
	- new patch-ae to resolve conflicts with #define _POSIX_VERSION
